'''âth-t-d-zh''' ('''kathatdezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:montage|montage]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-t-d-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:montage|montage]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-t-d-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kathatdezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithatdezhoko|thithatdezhoko]] || [[word:jithatdezhoko|jithatdezhoko]] || [[word:shithatdezhoko|shithatdezhoko]] || [[word:kithatdezhoko|kithatdezhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthatdezhoko|thuthuthatdezhoko]] || [[word:jujuthatdezhoko|jujuthatdezhoko]] || [[word:shushuthatdezhoko|shushuthatdezhoko]] || [[word:kukuthatdezhoko|kukuthatdezhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthatdezhoko|thuthatdezhoko]] || [[word:juthatdezhoko|juthatdezhoko]] || [[word:shuthatdezhoko|shuthatdezhoko]] || [[word:kuthatdezhoko|kuthatdezhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthatdezhoko|thuthatdezhoko]] || [[word:juthatdezhoko|juthatdezhoko]] || [[word:shuthatdezhoko|shuthatdezhoko]] || [[word:kuthatdezhoko|kuthatdezhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethatdezhoko|thethatdezhoko]] || [[word:jethatdezhoko|jethatdezhoko]] || [[word:shethatdezhoko|shethatdezhoko]] || [[word:kethatdezhoko|kethatdezhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothatdezhoko|thothothatdezhoko]] || [[word:jojothatdezhoko|jojothatdezhoko]] || [[word:shoshothatdezhoko|shoshothatdezhoko]] || [[word:kokothatdezhoko|kokothatdezhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothatdezhoko|thothatdezhoko]] || [[word:jothatdezhoko|jothatdezhoko]] || [[word:shothatdezhoko|shothatdezhoko]] || [[word:kothatdezhoko|kothatdezhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothatdezhoko|thothatdezhoko]] || [[word:jothatdezhoko|jothatdezhoko]] || [[word:shothatdezhoko|shothatdezhoko]] || [[word:kothatdezhoko|kothatdezhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthatdezhoko|thĂŠthatdezhoko]] || [[word:jĂŠthatdezhoko|jĂŠthatdezhoko]] || [[word:shĂŠthatdezhoko|shĂŠthatdezhoko]] || [[word:kĂŠthatdezhoko|kĂŠthatdezhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathatdezhoko|thathathatdezhoko]] || [[word:jajathatdezhoko|jajathatdezhoko]] || [[word:shashathatdezhoko|shashathatdezhoko]] || [[word:kakathatdezhoko|kakathatdezhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathatdezhoko|thathatdezhoko]] || [[word:jathatdezhoko|jathatdezhoko]] || [[word:shathatdezhoko|shathatdezhoko]] || [[word:kathatdezhoko|kathatdezhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathatdezhoko|thathatdezhoko]] || [[word:jathatdezhoko|jathatdezhoko]] || [[word:shathatdezhoko|shathatdezhoko]] || [[word:kathatdezhoko|kathatdezhoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
